title: Senior Plant Manager at Dabur India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Dabur India
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
